en: -♪♪♪♪ See, Amy? Fun thing about working cases.
ko: 봐, 에이미? 사건을 다루는 재미있는 점이야.

en: You meet people from all over the world. Okay, basal body temperature is optimal.
ko: 전 세계의 사람들을 만날 수 있어.

en: Let's do this quickly. Oh, Amy, I'm not some faucet you can just turn on and off.
You got to romance me. Faucet's on. Let's, uh... I'm gonna call Holt. You want to come?
Yeah. Too bad you're not invited. I'm in charge. Bye!
ko: 같이 갈래? 응. 안타깝게도 너는 초대받지 못했어. 내가 책임져.

en: I've been chasing this guy for three months. I've got him dead to rights.
Fingerprints, witnesses, it's in the bag. So I'm just gonna grab a healthy breakfast.
Are those gummy bears wrapped in a food roller?
Breakfast burrito, but, yeah. I pity your dentist.
Ah, joke's on you. I don't have a dentist.
ko: 아, 너가 잘못 생각했어. 난 치과 의사가 없어.

en: Then we figured out how to be good parents. TV and cake.
ko: 그때 우리는 좋은 부모가 되는 방법을 알아냈어.

en: TV and cake were my parents. It's okay.
Come with me, Amy, to the dumpster.
Me and Amy going diving in the dumpster.
